empty.activity: No activity has been recorded yet.
empty.notes: No notes have been created yet.

home.title: Collaborative screenwriting foundation
home.description: Courier Draft is a server-rendered collaboration platform for screenplay teams, built around Express, Nunjucks, Tailwind, MongoDB Atlas, and Socket.IO scaffolding.
home.architectureBody: This repository starts from a clear route map and realtime contract so later epics can plug into stable HTTP, fragment, and socket surfaces.

login.title: Sign in
login.heading: Sign in to Courier Draft
login.description: Sign in with Google to access your projects, collaborator invites, and activity feed.
login.googleDisclaimer: Only verified Google email addresses can sign in.
login.devDescription: Use a seeded local user so tests and local development can bypass the Google exchange when needed.

oauth.title: Google OAuth scaffold
oauth.heading: Google OAuth is scaffolded, not completed
oauth.description: This route exists so the later auth epic can plug in the real OAuth exchange without changing the public surface.

oauthCallback.title: OAuth callback scaffold
oauthCallback.heading: OAuth callback placeholder
oauthCallback.description: The callback route is wired for later work, but the real token exchange is intentionally deferred to a future epic.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heading: Workspace dashboard
dashboard.description: Review your projects, pending invites, and recent collaboration activity from one place.
dashboard.emptyState: Create a project to start collaborating, or finish onboarding and open your starter project.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.heading: Invite inbox
inbox.description: Review pending project invitations and decide where you want to collaborate next.

settingsProfile.title: Profile
settingsProfile.heading: Profile settings
settingsProfile.description: Choose how collaborators will see you across Courier Draft.
settingsProfile.apiHint: Profile changes save through the session-backed API.
settingsProfile.onboardingNotice: You need a unique username before the rest of the authenticated app unlocks.
settingsProfile.usernameHelp: Use 3-30 lowercase letters, numbers, or underscores. Usernames must start with a letter and end with a letter or number.

settingsPreferences.title: Preferences
settingsPreferences.heading: Preferences
settingsPreferences.description: Locale switching is fully wired through cookies, templates, and persisted user preferences.
settingsPreferences.formHint: The form below posts to `/locale`; the API path persists the same preference through `/api/v1/me/preferences`.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.heading: Create a project
newProject.description: Start a new collaboration space for your writing team.

newScript.title: New script
newScript.heading: Create a script
newScript.description: Create a script, capture its metadata, and start building the outline.

projectOverview.heading: Project overview
projectOverview.description: Review members, recent activity, and collaboration presence for this project.
projectOverview.scriptsPlaceholder: Script authoring stays stubbed in this PR, but the workspace is ready for onboarding, invites, member management, and collaboration history.
projectOverview.presenceEmpty: Presence will appear here once collaborators join the project room.

projectMembers.heading: Project members
projectMembers.description: Manage collaborators, pending invites, and project roles.
projectMembers.inviteDescription: Search existing Courier Draft accounts by username or email before sending the invite.

projectActivity.heading: Project activity
projectActivity.description: Recent durable activity already has a real model and list surface.

projectAudit.heading: Project audit log
projectAudit.description: Owner-only operational history for later release hardening.

projectCharacters.heading: Character registry
projectCharacters.description: Canonical project entities will grow here as later epics land.

projectLocations.heading: Location registry
projectLocations.description: Location entities are scaffolded with real storage and indexes.

projectSettings.heading: Project settings
projectSettings.description: Rename the project or transfer ownership to another active member.
projectSettings.transferEmpty: Add another active member before transferring ownership.

script.title: Script overview
script.heading: Script overview
script.description: Manage metadata, structure the outline, and move into the editor shell when you are ready.

scriptFields.title: Title
scriptFields.authorsHelp: Credits are stored in order and can be rearranged.

scriptSections.metadataHelp: This form controls the script-level fields that are durable in the API.
scriptSections.numberingHelp: Choose whether scene numbers are hidden, automatic, or frozen for production planning.
scriptSections.exportHelp: Generate a canonical standard PDF or a 9:16 mobile-reading PDF on demand.
scriptSections.dropHint: Drop a node here to append it inside this container.

scriptExport.selectionHelp: Selected acts include all descendant scenes. Explicit scene picks are unioned in canonical order.
scriptExport.noScenes: This script does not have any scenes to export yet.

scriptActions.deleteHelp: Deleting a script removes its outline, placeholder scenes, notes, and versions.

editor.heading: Screenplay editor
editor.description: Write scene drafts in a structured screenplay canvas with autosave, scene switching, and role-aware editability.
editor.placeholderBody: The screenplay body editor is intentionally deferred in this PR. This shell keeps the outline sidebar, script presence, and future editor mount point ready.
editor.sceneListHelp: Choose a scene from the canonical outline order.
editor.noScenesHelp: Create a scene in the outline to start writing here.
editor.collaboratorsHelp: Live presence in this scene updates as people join, leave, and switch between editing and viewing.
editor.collaboratorsEmpty: No collaborators are currently in this scene.
editor.noScenesHeading: This script does not have any scenes yet.
editor.noScenesBody: Scene writing starts from the outline. Add a scene on the script overview, then come back here to draft it.

todo.title: Foundation placeholder
todo.heading: This surface is scaffolded
todo.description: The route, authz, and rendering path are ready for a later epic.

invites.heading: Invites
invites.empty: No invites are waiting right now.

activity.heading: Activity feed
activity.empty: No project activity has been recorded yet.

members.heading: Member list
members.empty: No members are available for this project.
